children.text: In this Act, the term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.
This Act, referred to in text, is

children.tail: , known as the Agricultural Act of 2014. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out below and Tables.

children.text: This section was not enacted as part of title I of
“This Act [see Tables for classification] may be cited as the ‘Agriculture Improvement Act of 2018’.”

“This division [amending sections 1508b, 1516, 1523, 9011, 9013 to 9016, 9032, 9051, 9052, and 9054 to 9057 of this title and sections 3839aa–2 and 3841 of Title 16, Conservation, and enacting provisions set out as notes under sections 9011 and 9051 of this title] may be cited as the ‘Improvements to Agriculture Programs Act of 2018’.”
“This Act [see Tables for classification] may be cited as the ‘Agricultural Act of 2014’.”

children.text: The provisions of law applicable to a covered commodity (as defined in section 1111 of the Agricultural Act of 2014 (

children.tail: )), a loan commodity (as defined in section 1201 of that Act (
)), sugarcane, or sugar beets for the 2024 crop year pursuant to title I of that Act (
et seq.), each amendment made by subtitle C [§ 1301] of title I of the Agriculture Improvement Act of 2018 (
, and 7272 of this title], and section 102 of division B of the Further Continuing Appropriations and Other Extensions Act, 2024 (
) [see Tables for classification] shall be applicable to the 2025 crop year for that covered commodity, loan commodity, sugarcane, or sugar beets.

Except as otherwise provided in this section [amending sections 940c–2, 1627a, 1736f–1, 3222a, 5925c, 5925g, 5939, 6522, 6523, 7507, 8102, 8105, 8110, 8772, 9016, 9055, and 9059 of this title and sections 3839bb–2 and 3839bb–5 of Title 16, Conservation, enacting this note and provisions set out as notes under sections 9057 and 9092 of this title, and amending provisions set out as notes under sections 2101, 7101, 7632, and 8351 of this title] and the amendments made by this section, notwithstanding any other provision of law, the authorities (including any limitations on the authorities) provided by each provision of the Agriculture Improvement Act of 2018 (

children.tail: ) [see Tables for classification] and each provision of law amended by that Act (and for mandatory programs at such funding levels), as in effect on
, shall continue, and the authorities shall be carried out, until the later of—

children.text: the date specified in the provision of that Act or the provision of law amended by that Act.

Programs carried out using the authorities described in subsection (a) that are funded by discretionary appropriations (as defined in section 250(c) of the Balanced Budget and Emergency Deficit Control Act of 1985 (

children.tail: )) shall be subject to the availability of appropriations.

)), sugarcane, or sugar beets for the 2023 crop year pursuant to title I of that Act (
et seq.) and each amendment made by subtitle C [§ 1301] of title I of the Agriculture Improvement Act of 2018 (
, and 7272 of this title] shall be applicable to the 2024 crop year for that covered commodity, loan commodity, sugarcane, or sugar beets.
